abilities.name: Feel No Pain 5+
abilities.desc: This unit has a 5+ Feel No Pain

abilities.name: Hulking Bodyguards
abilities.desc: While a CHARACTER is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Crossfire
abilities.desc: in your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly GENESTEALER CULTS unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Flare Launcher
abilities.desc: The bearer’s unit has the SMOKE keyword and you can target it with the Smokescreen Stratagem for 0CP.

abilities.name: Spotter
abilities.desc: The bearer’s ranged weapons have a Ballistic Skill characteristic of 3+.

abilities.name: Survey Augur
abilities.desc: Each time the bearer’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more attacks made by the bearer this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly GENESTEALER CULTS model makes an attack against that unit, that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Outrider Gangs
abilities.desc: Each time you use the Cult Ambush ability to set this unit back up on the battlefield, in addition to the normal rules, all of its models must be set up wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and at least one of its models must be touching one of your Cult Ambush markers (that marker is then removed from the battlefield). If this cannot be done, this unit cannot be set back up.

abilities.name: Demolition Run
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, in your Movement phase, when this unit ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move, you can select one enemy unit within 6" of and visible to this unit and roll one D6 for each ATALAN JACKALS model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds.)

abilities.name: Brood Surge
abilities.desc:
Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Brood Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: this unit can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but it must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so those models can be within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

If, at the start of the battle, no model in this unit is equipped with a hand flamer, each time this unit makes a Brood Surge move, it can be moved up to 6" instead of up to D6". A unit cannot make a Brood Surge move while it is Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Cult Icon
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, you can return up to 3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit. If the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can return up to D3+3 destroyed models to that unit instead. This ability cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER models in Attached units and any [ONE SHOT] weapons equipped with by returned models that were shot before they were destroyed are still considered to have been shot.

abilities.name: A Plan Generations in the Making
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abilities.name: Swift and Deadly
abilities.desc: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
